title: MIA RPG Client
description: Welcome to the ultimate Minecraft RPG experience! Our server combines classic survival gameplay with deep RPG mechanics, challenging dungeons, and endless exploration opportunities.
body:
### This modpack is kid friendly, at the end the player can be quite strong!!

### There's the server side version which is more lightweight and otimized to play with your friends!

⚔️ Epic RPG Adventure Server ⚔️
Welcome to the ultimate Minecraft RPG experience! Our server combines classic survival gameplay with deep RPG mechanics, challenging dungeons, and endless exploration opportunities.

🌟 What Makes Us Special
RPG Class System
Choose your path as a mighty Paladin, cunning Rogue, powerful Wizard, skilled Archer, or brave Warrior! Each class comes with unique abilities, equipment, and playstyles. Progress through our custom leveling system and unlock powerful spells and skills.
Epic Dungeons & Structures

Dungeons Arise - Massive, challenging dungeons with epic loot
Seven Seas Adventures - Pirate-themed ocean exploration
Ancient City & Stronghold Overhauls - Enhanced vanilla structures
Custom Temples - Jungle and desert temple replacements
Sky Villages - Floating settlements to discover
Underground Villages - Hidden subterranean communities

Enhanced World Generation
Explore breathtaking new biomes with Regions Unexplored and discover unique landscapes that will keep you adventuring for hours. Every corner of the world holds secrets waiting to be uncovered.
🎮 Key Features
🏹 Combat & Classes

Advanced combat system with Better Combat
6+ RPG classes with unique abilities and progression
Spell casting system with Spell Engine
Custom weapons, armor, and artifacts through Relics RPG

🏰 Exploration & Adventure

Massive dungeon complexes
Overhauled villages with Villages & Pillages
Waystones for fast travel between discovered locations
Traveler's Backpack for extended expeditions

🍽️ Survival Enhanced

Farmer's Delight cooking system with multiple expansions
Ocean, Nether, and End-themed food additions
Improved farming with smarter farmers
Quality of life improvements without losing the survival challenge

👥 Community Features

Reputation System - Your actions matter with NPCs
Villager Guards - Protected settlements
Enhanced villager interactions
Balanced difficulty scaling

🔧 Quality of Life

Jade for block/entity information
Waystones fast travel network
JumpOverFences and other movement improvements
TreeHarvester for efficient forestry
DoubledDoors for better building

🎯 Perfect For Players Who Love:

Deep RPG progression and character building
Challenging dungeon exploration and boss fights
Collaborative base building and town creation
Balanced survival with enhanced mechanics
Long-term progression and achievement hunting
